com.dtwthalion.mpgo
 

  • Uses of Spectrum in com.dtwthalion.mpgo

    Subclasses of Spectrum in com.dtwthalion.mpgo
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Chromatogram
    Chromatogram: time-vs-intensity trace.
    class 
    MassSpectrum
    A mass spectrum: m/z + intensity arrays plus MS level, polarity, and an optional scan window.
    class 
    NMR2DSpectrum
    2-D NMR spectrum: row-major double[] intensity matrix of width × height points plus F1 and F2 axis descriptors.
    class 
    NMRSpectrum
    1-D NMR spectrum: chemical-shift + intensity arrays plus nucleus type and spectrometer frequency in MHz.
